_meta.author: isaiahbjork
_meta.title: Hover Detail Card
_meta.description: This component is a highly interactive, animated detail card that reveals contextual actions and visual flair when hovered. It displays a grid of images, pills with status and metadata, and animated buttons with customizable styles. Motion effects include staggered entrance, blur transitions, and hover-triggered scaling, powered by framer-motion. Perfect for showcasing media collections, feature tiles, or interactive product summaries where you want hover-based interactivity and polished motion design.
